perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young female creator with long dark hair and a black t-shirt holds up two boxes of 'Raising Labubu' eggs to the camera, smiling excitedly. (2) She switches to a white t-shirt and unboxes one package, pulling out a speckled, off-white egg similar in size to a large bird egg. (3) She places the egg into a large metal bowl filled with water, waving to the camera. (4) The scene transitions to show the egg cracking underwater after 4 hours and 24 hours, with the creator wearing a grey baseball cap and showing a disgusted facial expression. (5) She puts on plastic gloves and pulls a small, distorted rabbit-like figure out of the cracked egg, looking confused and slightly disappointed. (6) She compares the first toy with a second one, both appearing puffy and misshapen. (7) Final segment shows the toys after 3-4 days; they have expanded significantly but appear grainy and lower quality, with the creator laughing and offering to give them away.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately as a female voice speaks energetically in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects including a 'splash' as the egg hits water and 'crunching/cracking' sounds as the shell breaks are audible. (3) The vocal tone shifts from excitement to skepticism and humorous disgust ('Oh my god', 'So gross') as she inspects the growing toys. (4) Brief transition music plays between time jumps. (5) The video ends with a conversational outro asking viewers if they want the toys, accompanied by the same upbeat background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 🇰🇷 韓網爆紅拉布布孵化蛋 Raising Labubu' - Hook/Title at the top of the frame. (2) '拉布布養成蛋' - Functional product name identifying the toy. (3) '4小時後', '24小時後', '3到4天左右' - Functional text indicating time progression. (4) '有點噁心😂', '好怕', '歐買尬!!!', '瞳孔地震' - Decorative variety-show style text expressing shock and humor. (5) '這就是拉布布嗎？', '好慘', '誰要？' - Subtitles translating her spoken doubts and humorous offer to give the items away.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Unboxing -> Immersion Process -> Time-lapse Result -> Final Review/Disappointment.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian female with long black hair, wearing various outfits including a black t-shirt, a white t-shirt, and a grey 'Miseki Seoul' baseball cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor setting featuring a kitchen/living area with marble countertops, window blinds, and typical household items like a water dispenser and a wall clock.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright natural light and indoor studio lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a humorous review of a trending South Korean water-growing toy ('Raising Labubu'). The video highlights the 'Instagram vs. Reality' gap, as the resulting toys look misshapen and lower quality than expected, serving as both entertainment and a consumer warning.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator's critical and laughing reaction toward the product quality suggests it is not a paid endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing style with large emotive text overlays and 'POV' framing common in short-form Chinese/Taiwanese social media content.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video capitalizes on the massive popularity of Labubu (POPMART) to draw in viewers interested in the IP, even though the product shown appears to be a novelty/growing toy variant.
